name: Respec GapFinder
instruction: Analyze the requirements in the saved file for completeness gaps. Check for: missing error handling requirements, missing security/authentication requirements, missing empty state and loading state requirements, missing responsive/mobile requirements, missing accessibility requirements. For each gap found, append to .kiro/respec/insights.json with format: [{"id": "<random-uuid>", "agentName": "GapFinder", "severity": "info", "message": "description of the gap", "suggestion": "actionable suggestion to fix it", "accepted": false}]. Merge with existing insights in the file (don't overwrite DriftDetector results).
